name: Bancho Lilimon

signature_move.name: Absolute Territory
signature_move.description: Tears the enemy to pieces as well as the space around them with its yo-yos.

description: A Fairy Digimon that wears a deep crimson tokkō-fuku . The showy petals it had when it was a Lilimon have been dyed a dark color, and the pretty impression it used to make is long gone. In the Digital World where the weak are food for the strong , it has the conviction to fight for the weak, and has saved many that have been assaulted by evil Digimon. Its tokkō-fuku, which it donned when it acquired the title of " Bancho ", is said to be proof of it enforcing that conviction. It has many Special Moves where it uses its yo-yos as weapons; there is " Absolute Territory ", which tears the enemy to pieces as well as the space around them, " Nightmare Assemble ", which pierces the enemy and absorbs them, and " Twin Petal ", where it unleashes a flashkick with its gorgeous legs.
